description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:git Docker image with a docker:dind service, defines the stages test, build:hugo, release, and deploy, and sets CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE and CONTAINER_RELEASE_IMAGE variables. In the test stage add a test contentbuild job that runs the before_script "hugo version" on the registry.gitlab.com/osinfs/containerize:base-hugo-0.17 image and then executes "hugo --verbose --config config.toml", and a test contentbuild::FD job (allow_failure) that runs the same before_script and executes "hugo -FD". In the build:hugo stage add a build to realease job (environment production, only on tags) that first runs a global before_script sequence: sed -e "s/#version = \"v-VERSION\"/version = \"v-$CI_BUILD_REF_NAME\"/" -i config.toml, docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_BUILD_TOKEN registry.gitlab.com, apk add --update --no-cache curl, curl -LO https://releases.rancher.com/cli2/v$RANCHER_CLI_VERSION/rancher-linux-amd64-v$RANCHER_CLI_VERSION.tar.gz, tar zxvf rancher-linux-amd64-v$RANCHER_CLI_VERSION.tar.gz, mv rancher-v$RANCHER_CLI_VERSION/rancher /usr/local/bin/, curl -LO https://storage.googleapis.com/kubernetes-release/release/`curl -s https://storage.googleapis.com/kubernetes-release/release/stable.txt`/bin/linux/amd64/kubectl, mv kubectl /usr/local/bin, chmod +x /usr/local/bin/kubectl /usr/local/bin/rancher, rancher login --context $RANCHER_CONTEXT --token $RANCHER_TOKEN $RANCHER_URL, then runs "sed -e \"s/#Ganalytics/Ganalytics/\" -i config.toml", "docker build -f Dockerfile -t $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE .", and "docker push $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE". In the deploy stage add a deploy to production job (environment production, only on tags) that runs the same global before_script and then runs "rancher kubectl --namespace devopsdaysbsb set image deployment/devopsdaysbsb devopsdaysbsb=${CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE}". In the release stage add a release-image-tag-latest job (environment production, only on tags) that runs the global before_script and then runs "docker pull $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE", "docker tag $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE $CONTAINER_RELEASE_IMAGE", and "docker push $CONTAINER_RELEASE_IMAGE".
